question: What type of missile did North Korea launch off its East Coast on Tuesday?
answer: North Korea launched a suspected intermediate-range ballistic missile into the sea off its East Coast on Tuesday.
keypoints: North Korea launched a suspected intermediate-range ballistic missile into the sea off its East Coast on Tuesday.

question: What were the flight details of the missile launched from North Korea on Tuesday?
answer: The missile was fired from Pyongyang at approximately 7 a.m. local time and flew about 372 miles before landing in the sea.
keypoints: The missile was fired from Pyongyang at approximately 7 a.m. local time and flew about 372 miles before landing in the sea.

question: What event did North Korean leader Kim Jong-un oversee last month?
answer: North Korean leader Kim Jong-un oversaw a ground test of a solid-fuel engine for a hypersonic missile last month.
keypoints: North Korean leader Kim Jong-un oversaw a ground test of a solid-fuel engine for a hypersonic missile last month.
